key.name: frame-width
key.description: Percentage of screen width the window will occupy.

key.name: frame-height
key.description: Percentage of screen height the window will occupy.

key.name: allow-forced-resize
key.description: Allows forced resizing even if the window is maximized.

key.name: change-position
key.description: Whether to center the window on the screen.

key.name: centering-keybinding
key.description: Key combination to center and resize the window.

key.name: indicator-position
key.description: Position of the extension's icon within the top bar's right-hand status area. Lower values are closer to the center of the screen, higher values are closer to the system indicators.

key.name: stopwatch-enabled
key.description: Show the stopwatch in the panel menu.

key.name: stopwatch-state
key.description: Persisted stopwatch state (0=running, 1=paused, 2=reset), used to survive Shell reloads.

key.name: stopwatch-total-ms
key.description: Persisted elapsed time checkpoint, used to survive Shell reloads.

key.name: stopwatch-running-since
key.description: Epoch ms of the last save while running; 0 when not running. Used to survive Shell reloads.

key.name: system-monitor-enabled
key.description: Show CPU, RAM and disk indicators in the panel menu.

key.name: system-monitor-interval
key.description: How often to update system monitor readings.

key.name: ram-indicator-notify
key.description: Send a notification when RAM usage exceeds the threshold.

key.name: ram-indicator-threshold
key.description: RAM usage percentage that triggers a notification.
